caption: A man with glasses and headphones, wearing a white shirt and a red bow tie, speaks in a room filled with framed photographs and clothing racks. He has an unusual, spiked, greyish hairpiece on his head. In front of him is a professional black microphone. On the screen, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible, with the word "PODCAST" appearing below it. The scene remains static across the sequence, with the man remaining in the same position and continuing to speak, showing only slight movements of his mouth and facial expression as he talks. The background consists of a wall covered in small, framed pictures and shelves containing folded garments, including some with "LEE" branding.
